name: Komondor
description: The Komondor is a massive Hungarian livestock guardian dog immediately recognizable by its extraordinary white corded coat that resembles a mop and can weigh up to 20 pounds on an adult dog. Brought to Hungary by nomadic Magyar tribes, they have guarded sheep and cattle for centuries, using their white coat as camouflage among the flocks. Fiercely independent and protective, they are impressive dogs that require dedicated owners willing to invest in their unique grooming needs.

conditions_detail.name: Hip Dysplasia
conditions_detail.description: Hip dysplasia is a genetic condition where the hip joint doesn't develop properly, causing the ball and socket to not fit together correctly. This leads to joint deterioration, pain, and arthritis over time.
conditions_detail.treatment_overview: Treatment ranges from weight management and physical therapy for mild cases to total hip replacement for severe cases. NSAIDs and joint supplements help manage pain.
prevention_tips: Screen breeding stock with hip scoring

conditions_detail.name: Gastric Dilatation-Volvulus (GDV / Bloat)
conditions_detail.description: GDV is a life-threatening emergency in which the stomach fills with gas and rotates on its axis, trapping gas, cutting off blood supply, and causing rapid circulatory shock. It can kill within hours without emergency surgery.
conditions_detail.treatment_overview: Emergency stabilisation with IV fluids and gastric decompression, followed by immediate surgical detorsion and gastropexy. Prophylactic gastropexy is strongly recommended at the time of neutering for high-risk breeds.
prevention_tips: Feed two smaller meals per day
Avoid vigorous exercise 1 hour before and after meals
Avoid raised food bowls (evidence is mixed)

conditions_detail.name: Entropion
conditions_detail.description: Entropion is an inward rolling of the eyelid margin, causing the eyelashes and skin to rub against the corneal surface. This produces chronic irritation, pain, corneal ulceration, and scarring that can impair vision.
conditions_detail.treatment_overview: Temporary eyelid tacking can relieve discomfort in puppies pending maturity. Definitive surgical correction (Hotz-Celsus procedure) is highly effective in adults.
prevention_tips: Avoid breeding dogs with severe conformational entropion
Do not breed surgically corrected dogs
